mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kanban_column WHERE board_id = #{boardId, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM kanban_column WHERE id = #{columnId, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER} AND board_id = #{boardId, javaType=java.util.UUID, jdbcType=OTHER})
